entities.name: INDIAN PEANUT CLUMP VIRUS
entities.description: A virus that infects peanut and other host plants, with isolates collected from various Indian locations

entities.name: BAPATLA
entities.description: A geographical location in India where IPCV isolates were collected

entities.name: CHINNAGANJAM
entities.description: A geographical location in India where IPCV isolates were collected

entities.name: HYDERABAD
entities.description: A geographical location in India where IPCV isolates were collected

entities.name: LUDHIANA
entities.description: A geographical location in India where IPCV isolates were collected

entities.name: TALOD
entities.description: A geographical location in India where IPCV isolates were collected

entities.name: CANAVALIA ENSIFORMIS
entities.description: A host plant used to distinguish IPCV isolates based on symptoms

entities.name: NICOTIANA CLEVELANDII X GLUTINOSA
entities.description: A host plant used to distinguish IPCV isolates based on symptoms

entities.name: PHASEOLUS VULGARIS
entities.description: A host plant used to distinguish IPCV isolates based on symptoms

entities.name: VIGNA UNGUICULATA
entities.description: A host plant used to distinguish IPCV isolates based on symptoms

entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: The primary crop affected by Indian peanut clump virus

entities.name: HOST RANGE
entities.description: The variety of host plants that a virus can infect

entities.name: SYMPTOMATOLOGY
entities.description: The study and description of symptoms caused by the virus

entities.name: SEROLOGICAL TESTS
entities.description: Tests used to determine the serological relationships between virus isolates

entities.name: PARTICLE SIZE
entities.description: A physical property of the virus particles used for differentiation

entities.name: RNA SPECIES
entities.description: The genetic material components of the virus, specifically two species of 1.90 and 1.65 x 10^6 Mr

entities.name: POLYPEPTIDE
entities.description: A protein component of the virus with a mass of 24 x 10^3 Mr

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of peanut genotypes to withstand infection by IPCV

entities.name: DIAGNOSIS
entities.description: The process of identifying the presence and type of IPCV
